title: Chapter 183
content:
Chapter 182

The rest of the day passed by pretty boringly. I rested a bit, trained a bit, cleaned my body a bit of mana impurities gathered from the mana potions, and then rested some more.

It was around dusk, sun rays were still up in the sky, when there was a knock on my door.

A female knight stood on the other side, but she was under heavy armor as she spoke from underneath the helmet, “Lady Zara has summoned you to her quarters.”

I didn’t see the need to ask a question and simply nodded. The knightess didn’t lead me there; she just delivered the message and went on her merry way.

I was the only one who made my way to Zara’s room, stopping outside Zara’s room to let the female knights outside her room know of my presence.

They relayed my request to enter, and the door opened from the inside soon, letting me enter. The one to open the door was, however, a person who surprised me. I hadn’t seen him for quite a while now.

“Brother.” I said in a questioning tone, “What are you doing here?”

“He’s here with me.” I heard a familiar voice come from further in the room. I spotted a familiar figure I hadn’t seen for quite some time now.

Her youthful figure resembled that of a teen, but she was a year older than that. Her long, lustrous hair shone even in the dim light of the room. Her deep brown eyes, borderline black, were still sharp and full of determination.

Her skin was silky soft and milky white with an elegance that could be noticed even from far away, and her face was refined with noble features, especially her puckered, kissable lips.

Her chest was a good size D, or maybe a little smaller than E, perfectly caged in the chest armor piece she always wore.

Her perfectly toned body showed the hard work of a warrior in training, but if my memory served me right, her ass was a masterpiece just like her mother’s. It was not tight in the least, soft and so fucking touchable.

“Young lady Cassandra,” I said, gently bowing to greet her.

“Long time no see, Jack.” She greeted me back before she further said, “I was just here to tell Mother of my advancement. I have successfully finished constructing my fourth star, and now I am ready to fill in my aura core and strengthen it for the fifth star.”

“Congratulations are in order, young lady,” I replied with a smile.

“And…” Cassandra said, almost ignoring my congratulations, “Also, to let my mother know that I am ready for marriage. Lucas’s strength has risen to a sufficient and appropriate level. I was here to ask Mother to do something about his status.”

I was a little surprised, to be honest.

Well, given how they were both pretty straightforward about this, it was bound to happen. What surprised me was how she was practically telling Zara, not asking or requesting anything.

I also looked at Lucas. He was still at the third star, but given that he was halfway through and he didn’t have my help, as our sisters did, he was probably working very hard. Maybe that quality was what got Cassandra’s attention.

“And I was telling my daughter it wasn’t as easy as it sounded,” Zara said calmly from her bed, lying down in a white silk gown that I hadn’t seen before.

“Do you object, Mother?” Cassandra sharply turned to Zara and asked.

“No, sweetheart. I do not object to your and Lucas’s marriage. But you have to understand that we are not in our territory. This is my father’s territory. He needs to be aware of this.” Zara said, which was also another way of telling Cassandra that Carlson already had something in his mind for Cassandra, which was expected of a man like Carlson.

After all, he had a perfectly ripe young granddaughter. While sexual concepts remained absent, the political aspects of a marriage were still present in this situation.

There was no way Carlson wouldn’t have anything in mind for Cassandra. Especially since his goal was to gain more influence in the royal court, especially with some incidents going on.

“Why would Grandfather decide something for me?” Cassandra asked, even though she knew full well what Zara actually meant. She was brushing it off fully, letting Zara know she wouldn’t even bother to worry about this.

“Haa…” Zara sighed and then looked at me, then she looked at Lucas, and then back at Cassandra, “If it is Jack, I can talk to Father. You can live with Lucas after marrying Jack, and Lucas can marry Jack’s future wife, and then have her live with you. How is that?”

“Do you intend to create a web of confusion, Mother?” Cassandra asked curtly, “What is next? Jack and I have children together, but I raise them with Lucas, and Lucas has children with the woman Jack wishes to marry, and raise them with him? Whom would they actually be? Mine or that other woman’s?”

“…”

Zara was silent at that. Speechless, more like it.

“Besides, it is not Jack I wish to marry. It is Lucas. I shall marry him, even if I have to run away.”

You tell her girl.

Zara was once again speechless at her daughter. She remained silent for a while, sighing once in between before she finally said, “Alright. I will make it so that does not happen.”

“Thank you, Mother. I shall take my leave now.” Cassandra said with a smile, happy with the outcome, and was about to leave when she looked at me and, as if something came to her mind, she turned to Zara and asked, “What have you called Jack for, Mother?”

“For my empowerment,” Zara replied.

“Oh,” Cassandra said, nothing in reply.

She remained silent for a few moments before she lowered her hand and rubbed the outside of her crotch through her luxurious leather pants and said, “It has been some time since I had the chance to be empowered by Jack. Would you mind if I join?”

“Not at all, sweetheart. It would actually be better for your martial journey.” Zara replied with a slight smile, a motherly smile that I didn’t see often on her face.

“But what about Lucas?” Zara turned to Lucas and said.

“Do not worry, Mother. Lucas is already aware of Jack’s condition. His mother affirmed it when we visited her before coming here, and he is also placed under a mana oath to not talk about it.”

Cassandra’s words were another surprise, but not like I cared. Lucas was bound to find out someday. I didn’t really care too much that he would find out.

It was just that fucking Cassandra behind him would have been fun in the future, as it was very much so the few times I did it. But now, fucking her before him would be even more fun.

“Lady Zara, would it be all right if I began with young lady Cassandra?” I asked, speaking for the first time after congratulating Cassandra, because none of the conversation that followed required my input, and I couldn’t bother to interfere either. Whether they were married or not, I would still be getting Cassandra’s pussy.

It would have been better if they were married, because that had its own twisted fun.

“Of course. I understand it has been some time.” Zara said, all for watching her daughter get fucked.

I smiled and moved forward, making my way to Cassandra as she stood at the edge of Zara’s bed.

“May I, my lady?” I asked, and Cassandra nodded, letting me take off her armor.

I saw Lucas stand in one corner, keeping his eyes on me, as if warning me with his gaze not to be disrespectful to Cassandra.

I couldn’t help but chuckle at how I was going to play with Cassandra, in any way I wanted, and he would be watching, being able to do nothing at all. The poor bastard couldn’t even join thanks to the natural laws of this world.

It wasn’t long before I undressed Cassandra. There wasn’t any underwear in this world, so as I removed Cassandra’s pants, from which she stepped out, she was fully naked, standing there all in her milky white glory.

I took one of her soft tits in my hand, pinching the pink, perky nipple gently.

“Hn…”

Cassandra softly gasped, lightly biting her lower lip to maybe muffle her moan, which I couldn’t understand why she would.

The freedom of this world allowed them to moan without any reserve. It’s not like anyone would care even if they heard it. They would simply think it was a little unconventional, but not spare a second glance at it.

It was then that my gaze went to her face, and I saw her eyes stealing glances at Lucas.

Did they?

Oh, this just got so much better. I was intending to just have fun with her, but now I am going to have some more fun.

Starting with…

“My lady, have you done this with Lucas?”

~~
